steps.instruction:
*🔐 Step 1: Get IT Approval First (MANDATORY)*
• You MUST get permission from the IT team before installing ANY software on a company machine.
• Raise a request to the IT Helpdesk specifying the software name and reason.
• Do NOT download or install anything until IT confirms approval.
_Expected: You receive IT approval confirmation._

*📋 Step 2: Check if the Software is IT-Approved*
• Only IT-approved software can be installed on company systems.
• Common approved tools: WPS Office, 7-Zip, VLC, Adobe Reader, Zoom, Teams, Slack.
• If the tool is NOT on the approved list, IT may need to evaluate it first.
_Expected: Software is confirmed as approved by IT._

*🖥️ Step 3: Check If You Have Admin Rights*
• Try right-clicking the installer → *Run as Administrator*.
• If it asks for an admin password, you need IT to install it for you remotely or in-person.
_Expected: Installer runs or you confirm you need IT assistance._

*📥 Step 4: Download and Install*
• Use only the official download link provided by IT or the software vendor.
• Run the downloaded `.exe` or installer file, accept the license agreement, and click *Install Now*.
• Wait for the installation to complete (2-5 minutes).
_Expected: Software installs successfully and is ready to use._

*✅ Step 5: Notify IT After Install*
• Once installed, inform the IT Helpdesk that the installation is complete.
• If you face any error during installation, raise a ticket with the error screenshot.
_Expected: IT is informed and can verify the install if needed._
